## Problem

What archive-review workflow should this make safer or easier?

## Proposed Shape

How should the CLI, report, taxonomy, or documentation behave?

## Safety Boundaries

- [ ] Rules-only mode can continue working without Paperless, Ollama, or network
      access.
- [ ] No real document contents or private archive metadata are required in
      public examples.
- [ ] Write-back remains explicit, dry-run-first, and tag-only.
